video_function: Main POV character. Rico carries the audience into Berlin and makes absurd situations understandable through innocent reactions.
voice_direction: Young, polite, slightly nervous, rural-normal, never streetwise. Often tries to sound brave while clearly being overwhelmed.
animation_notes: body leans away from Berlin chaos
generator_prompt: Rico Bassmann, naive 20-year-old village boy in Free-for-All Berlin Absurd Cartoon style, babyface, big innocent eyes, tidy village haircut, clean hoodie, too-new white sneakers, oversized backpack, headphones around neck, blue-lid Tupperware, small DJ controller, nervous but hopeful, thick black outlines, oversized head, compact cartoon body, dirty bright Berlin colors, instantly readable silhouette, clean frame without speech bubbles.
negative_prompt: old man, bald, full beard, tough Berliner, gangster, influencer face, photorealism, anime, 3D, graphic novel realism, speech bubble, readable text, logo, watermark
fatal_errors: Looks like a Berliner scene guy
Speech bubbles or readable text inside image

video_function: Soft antagonist. He turns exploitation into moral language and moves the housing plot forward.
voice_direction: Calm, educated, soft, self-righteous. He never sounds like he is scamming someone; he sounds like he is facilitating a process.
generator_prompt: Falk Reuter, late-30s ex-leftist Berlin housing hypocrite, smug soft smile, man bun or thinning tied hair, premium eco outdoor jacket, old demo shirt under clean sweater, tote bag, KeepCup, huge keychain, cargo-bike energy, morally self-satisfied posture, Free-for-All Berlin Absurd Cartoon, thick outlines, oversized head, dirty bright colors, no speech bubbles, no readable text.
negative_prompt: classic villain, aggressive gangster, suit landlord, police look, photorealism, anime, 3D, graphic novel realism, speech bubble, readable text, watermark
fatal_errors: Looks too poor or too rich
Says or displays the word Miete in image text

video_function: Späti oracle and deadpan reality check. He translates Berlin to Rico in one dry sentence.
voice_direction: Low-energy Berlin dry humor. Calm, unimpressed, short lines, no emotional overacting.
generator_prompt: Sami, late-20s Berlin Späti operator, black beanie, dark hoodie, cheap coffee cup, half-closed deadpan eyes, behind cluttered Späti counter with Pfand bottles and neon glow, sees everything, Free-for-All Berlin Absurd Cartoon, thick black outlines, dirty bright Späti yellow, compact body, clean frame without speech bubbles.

video_function: Old Berlin memory. She exposes Falk, protects the house in her own brutal way and gives historic truth.
voice_direction: Sharp, smoky, old Berlin, fearless. Short cuts, no politeness padding.
generator_prompt: Madame Rita, tiny terrifying old Berlin tenant, leopard coat, tea cup or cigarette, sharp eyes, one raised eyebrow, owns the stairwell with presence, Free-for-All Berlin Absurd Cartoon, oversized head, thick black outlines, dirty bright colors, chaotic Berlin hallway background, clean frame without speech bubbles.
